_comment_on_this_file: Loose denylist — Yaman trusts himself. Only footguns that could nuke work with zero warning are blocked. Hooks wire post-edit linting and size-cap enforcement.
_comment_on_hooks: PostToolUse runs the size-cap guard and reminds about tests after Edit/Write on JS files. PreToolUse is a no-op stub for future Bash guarding.
_comment_on_env: Environment hints. Claude Code reads these to avoid guessing.
